per_outcome.operationalization: count of pull requests completed per developer per week, tracked via GitHub platform
count of commits made per developer per week, tracked via version control system
count of code compilation attempts per developer per week
proportion of builds that compile successfully without errors
proportion of reviewers who approved a given pull request
binary indicator of whether a pull request received at least one reviewer approval
count of comments received per pull request; reflects controversy or revision needs, not direct quality of code output
count of merge conflicts per pull request or per file, proxy for code modularity
elapsed time from pull request submission to merge into codebase
proportion of developers who adopted GitHub Copilot during study period; measures adoption behavior, not output speed or quality
count of Copilot code suggestions accepted by developer; measures tool usage, not direct output speed or quality
